prerequisites.value: Weapon Focus (any two-handed reach weapon), Perform (dance) 4 ranks.

description.value: **Benefit:** Each time you hit a creature with a two-handed reach weapon that you have Weapon Focus in, the creature is dazzled for 1 round. Combat Trick Note If using the optional Stamina Pool rules, the following trick may be used with this feat. Combat Trick: When you inflict the dazzled condition on an opponent using the Spear Dancer feat, you can spend up to 5 stamina points to increase the duration of the effect by 1 round per stamina point spent.
